name: openEuler bigdata SIG
description: Bigdata sig aims at that the openEuler community needs to consider how to give full play to the role of data in production and life from a technical perspective, and build the capacity related to big data processing.

name: openEuler bigdata SIG Repository List
description: openEuler bigdata SIG maintains 71 repositories in the Big Data domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler bigdata SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Bigdata sig aims at that the openEuler community needs to consider how to give full play to the role of data in production and life from a technical perspective, and build the capacity related to big data processing.. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 71 repositories in the Big Data domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler bigdata SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler bigdata SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at bigdata@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler bigdata SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler bigdata SIG maintains 71 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/bigdata.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler bigdata SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler bigdata SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: yangzhao, wuzeyi, chenqiang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
